story: As a product owner I would like the user to be able to select a product add it to the cart and checkout

cases.title: Add product to cart
cases.when: User clicks the add button on a product card

cases.title: Verify product in cart
cases.given: User has added a product to the cart
cases.then: The cart modal displays the added product with correct name, quantity, and price

cases.title: Checkout button enabled
cases.given: User has at least one product in the cart

cases.title: Complete checkout process
cases.given: User has products in the cart
cases.then: An order confirmation message is displayed

cases.title: Dismiss order confirmation
cases.then: The order confirmation is dismissed and the user returns to the product catalogue
